title: amauropelta gomeziana
intro: Amauropelta gomeziana is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae, native to Central and South America. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Amauropelta gomeziana include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to make use of its medicinal properties.
